programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Iyer and Natu Kaka, Jethalal takes the stage and truly ends up with a task that causes him difficulty and nervousness..

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Shocked by her task, Daya tries her best to prevent herself from dancing. However, she fails to do so and begins to do 'garba'.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya panics when she hears that Sundarlal has gone missing. Soon, she tells Nattu Kaka to get her tickets to Ahmedabad.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tries to find Sundarlal by calling his friends. However, Sundarlal seems to have vanished without a trace.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya finds Sundarlal at the airport and takes him home. However, Sundarlal tells Daya and Anjali not to let anyone know he has arrived at the society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya is conflicted when Jethalal forces her to choose between himself and Sundarlal. Later, Daya enlists Tapu's help to sneak Sundarlal around.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya is nervous about Jethalal finding Sundarlal hidden in their house. Later, Jethalal becomes suspicious when Daya is eager for him to leave.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal catches a peek of Sundarlal in his kitchen and assumes it is a burglar. Soon, the rest of Gokuldham Society panics and begins searching for the supposed criminal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Zorawar is on the lookout for Sundarlal and hunts all over the society. However, Sundarlal dresses up as a housemaid to evade capture.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundarlal dresses up as a woman to disguise himself. However, chaos ensues when the other residents assume Sundarlal is Popatlal's girlfriend.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Holi celebrations continue in full swing. Meanwhile, Zorawar and his men hunt for Sundarlal all over Gokuldham Society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Champaklal's feet hurt, Jethalal and Tapu fight over helping him. Later, Jethalal feels embarrassed in front of Babita.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal's phone stops functioning and he tries various techniques to fix the problem. Later, he decides to purchase a smartphone from Jethalal's store.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal is keen on buying his new phone as per the auspicious time given by the priest. At the shop, he harasses Jethalal a lot over selecting the phone.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Dr Salunkhe manages to save Daya's life by performing an emergency medical procedure. Later, the CID team finds a dead body inside the vault and discover an entrance to a long tunnel.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Sanjana is asked to surrender the mysterious briefcase because of which she was kidnapped. Meanwhile, Daya manages to save Abhijeet in the nick of time.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A dejected Jethalal plans to take his family to Lonavala when Babita does not invite him to her birthday party. But when Babita learns the truth she confronts Iyer about the error.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Daya excitedly rush to get the perfect gift for Babita's birthday party. On the other hand, Babita and Iyer's grand party begins in full swing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Daya reach right on time for Babita's bash and learn that they failed to get the perfect gift for her. Later, Champaklal attends the party and feels horrified to find Daya in a dress.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide is happy to finally be out of jail and have his name cleared in the gold case. Later, he visits each of his friends to thank them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide is unable to come up with a thoughtful quote to write on the public chalkboard. Later, Champaklal comes by and suggests a great thought for him to use.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha interrupts Jethalal in his signature way as he enjoys his cup of tea in the morning. Just then, Bawri rushes into the shop to talk to him about an important matter.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal learns that Jethalal wants to go to Sanghvi's birthday party and scolds him for desiring to leave his family to stay out late at night.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal humiliates Jethalal in public for coming home late. Later, Jethalal begins to resent him for overreacting to a small mistake.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Popatlal fight with a stranger, who steals Jethalal's lucky bangle and Popatlal's umbrella, at the tea stall.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A man arrives at Gada Electronics and claims that he is the owner of the shop while Natu Kaka and Bagha try to get him out.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal files a complaint at the police station, and the inspector calls Jethalal to confirm Popatlal's story. Meanwhile, Mr Singhania heads to Gada Electronics to attend a meeting.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The kids play cricket and Tapu hits a shot that breaks Bhide's window. Bhide gets into a heated argument with Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone tries their best to pacify Bhide, who strongly opposes the kids from playing cricket in the compound.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal brings a new video game console home after Tapu asks him to get one. Tapu goes to bed early to get himself prepared for his all-day game session.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The parents of the Gokuldham Society feel upset upon seeing their kids play video games all day and start convincing them to play outside.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The parents of Gokuldham Society succeed in luring their kids back to the playground to play cricket.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone in Gokuldham Society is excited to see Dr Hathi as he returns home and joins the kids in their games.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The fun and games continue as the members of Gokuldham Society form two teams and compete with each other.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu impresses Bhide and Madhavi by helping them fix the computer. However, Bhide becomes hooked on using social media.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and Madhavi are ecstatic after Bhide receives an email that claims he has won a jackpot of 1 crore, but he needs to transfer 50,000 rupees first.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Bhide and Madhavi become rich, they scheme together about spending the money while keeping their relationships with the other residents the same.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide receives another email telling him to transfer 100,000 rupees in order to claim the jackpot, and he finds himself alone in the situation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Since they cannot ask the residents for a loan, Bhide and Madhavi agree to pawn Madhavi's jewellery and use the money to claim the jackpot.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Bhide and Madhavi fantasise about what to do with the prize money, Popatlal warns the residents of a scam email that has been circulating.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and Madhavi finally realise they have been tricked. A dangerous man visits the housing community.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Bhide tries to negotiate with the scammer, Abdul hears the conversation and brings all the residents to help Bhide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents try to cheer Bhide up as he becomes disheartened after the incident. Later, the police inform them the IP address of the scammer has been found.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The police arrest the scammers, and the residents promise Bhide he will get his money back. Popatlal tells Tapu and his friends that a celebrity is coming to see them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Darsheel Safary promotes his new film in Gokuldham. Everyone recalls Tapu and his friends' heroic moments.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal receives his grandfather's photograph from Champaklal and vows to keep this treasured family heirloom safe.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal contacts Taarak after losing his wallet, which contains his grandfather's photo. He blames himself for his carelessness in losing such a precious memento.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak assists Jethalal in the search for his wallet. Nattu Kaka suggests Jethalal find another way to get his grandfather's photograph.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal turns to Sundarlal for assistance in locating his grandfather's photo and opens up about his worries to friends in Gokuldham Society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal urges Daya to keep quiet about the missing wallet. Tapu finds out about the problem and decides to lend a hand.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Daya and Anjali turn to prayer, Jethalal and the Gokuldham residents exhaust every possibility in their search efforts.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu attempts to solve the problem creatively. Bagha searches for the thief. Jethalal prays desperately for a miracle.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal bravely tells Champaklal about the missing photograph, but an unforeseen turn of events follows.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings amidst their father's alcoholism.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.
